Read through this service description before making any contact with me. Please, feel free to stop reading right now if you find this reading to be too much effort on your part—you’re not a good fit for me.

My work is your life.

You are the material, there is no program, there is only co-creation. Together we go to war with your false self to free your true self on your voyage to sovereignty.

The Agreement Our success together depends on a shared agreement between you and I. We become partners, not friends—working towards your desired outcome.

  • You speak truthfully and follow through on your required work—even if it is failing.
  • I listen compassionately (removing my ego) and hold you accountable for your work.

Building on top of this agreement is how I will get your through the rough seas of transformation together. Understand the agreement we are making

The Fees I offer a limited capacity of varying degrees of access to me that is reflected in the starter prices below.

Access Level 01 »> You may want to add the branded name for the group like you have in Obsidian with a mini description.

Access Level 02

Access Level 03

Payments are made in full or in weekly to monthly instalments after an upfront deposit based on your chosen level of access.

The Expectations/Committment You are making a commitment to yourself that you will show up. No matter how hard you fall, you will fight to get back up every time.

I am here to guide and support you and to do that successfully I need the following from you.Strict no-tolerance policy for substances (alcohol, drugs, etc.) to ensure maximum focus and energy. / strict policy that you maintain complete sobriety or drinking, no drugs, no alcohol, no cigarettes, no vapes, and no pornography.

8-12 hours per week towards self motivated transformation and practice which involve daily readings, reflection, journaling, creative exercises, etc.

Adherence to confidentiality and privacy in our work together and with your peers in any group sessions or communications.

Authentic communication about emotional challenges—this is for you safety. Yes, that includes anything you find yourself in disagreement with or do not like about our work together.

Maintain a standard of discipline for our work together as it is the best measurement for us to track our progress and celebrate your wins.

The Structure I create a container that facilitates growth and authenticity in our work together. My approach to our engagement is one of intensity, flexibility, and high investment that requires both of our consistent efforts. Here’s what to expect from me as I oversea and guide you forward. Initial on-boarding sessions to setup our working environment, clarify your immediate needs, and put in place our first port of call. Focused weekly accountability check-ins to address challenges and/or celebrate wins.

Scheduled working sessions over video and/or voice to keep your recovery and development in alignment moving forward.

Text support throughout the week with full availability across timezones for sessions, emergency calls, and messenger contact from Sunday-Wednesday.

Access to regular workshops, lectures, and tools to further your knowledge and application of new skills and practices.

Receiving customized material to consume, creative activities, and writing exercises to strengthen our work together.

Intimate personal connection that enhances your momentum forward with accountability, patiencecompassion and deep empathy.

The Client I often work with those facing emotional challenges from past and current relationships (eg. creative expression, emotional control, loss of purpose, with self, intimates, parental, etc.) that have left unresolved and/or overlooked traumatic experiences.

Maybe: Those who have grown a custom to dealing with emotional challenges that are associated with previous relationships. A romantic partner, family, or through previous therapeutic experiences where they felt on unheard and unseen and unsupported. I often work with individuals who have experienced deep trauma through childhood abusive marriages and abusive family dynamics.

Those who are alert, curious, courageous, vulnerable, creative, purpose driven, and aspire to live a life of sovereignty through exceptional standards of maturity and the resilience to grow are who I find the best alignment with for success.

I seek to only work with those who are currently ready and prepared to make the sacrifices necessary to move forward. Hungry for transformation an in complete commitment to the work, accelerating their path towards a better life under my guidance and supervision.

The Practice Independent by design and not licensed as a therapist or associated with any professional bodies or institutions. This provides me the necessary freedom and opportunity to collaborate with clients across all spectrums of life in an intimate direct and highly involved manner.

All communications with me are managed by me nor do I have a VA (virtual assistant) or use automated chat systems or employee people to pretend to be me. I’m in the healing and recovery business and that requires human connection from start to finish. That being said my approach in all matters is to take time, like everything of value in life—I follow the natural order.

“Slow is smooth. Smooth is fast.” - George Morris

I live by a philosophy of integrated authenticity which is built on an adherence to maintaining functional boundaries. My practice is built on this which allows me to commit 2 hours a day to the study (2 books minimum per week) of my craft alongside 3 hours of personal development work. This is mandatory, as I can only guide you as far as I have gone in my own personal voyage of emotional recovery, creative expression, and personal development after trauma.

The Application I work with the bare minimum of clients to maintain the highest quality of service for each relationship. For example, at the highest level of access my capacity is 8-12 people per year. I accept 1-3 applications per month with on-boarding occurring every 2-3 months based on capacity.

Yes, reserving your spot with a deposit for the next available intake is possible, otherwise the newsletter is where you will hear about spot openings if you are not already on the waitlist.

I encourage you to message me via Instagram (@dwaynemcyrus) immediately if you want to start working together within the next 1-2 two months.

To be sure that your message gets bumped to the top of my inbox. Be sure to start the conversation with these exact words “Hey Cyrus!” as your first message. This will let me know that you have invested the time to read through and are inquiring about becoming a client and not another matter.

Once I see the magic words I’ll get the conversation started by sending you a few voice messages to get our conversation going.

Final Note My private mentorship differs from my public conversations and lectures as it is a place for co-creation. Collaborative work in a sacred space of emotional security and privacy as we restructure your current state of being. Our work is very challenging and it must be as that is where the growth resides. It will be challenging and confronting on an emotional, mental, spiritual, and physical level based on the material we are dealing with together at any given time.

To conclude, the work is highly demanding and highly rewarding which requires us both to walk together in focused attention and openness to new possibilities.

  • Cyrus (add a signature picture below)
